```
object TestInbox
  def apply(name) → TestInbox[T]
trait TestInbox
  def ref → ActorRef[T]
  def receiveMessage → T
  def expectMessage(expectedMessage) → TestInbox[T]
  def receiveAll → immutable.Seq[T]
  def hasMessages → Boolean
trait ReplyInbox
  def receiveReply → T
  def expectReply(expectedReply) → Unit
  def expectNoReply → ReplyInbox[T]
  def hasReply → Boolean
trait StatusReplyInbox
  def receiveStatusReply → StatusReply[T]
  def receiveValue → T
  def receiveError → Throwable
  def expectValue(expectedValue) → Unit
  def expectErrorMessage(errorMessage) → Unit
  def expectDone
  def expectNoReply → StatusReplyInbox[T]
  def hasReply → Boolean
```
